Site Results &
Technical Proof

Every metric, schema, and SEO decision on this site — open for inspection. This is what we build for your listing.

Performance

Technical Architecture

PageSpeed Score

100 / 100

Mobile & desktop — verified via Lighthouse

Framework

Astro 4 (SSG)

Zero JS by default — pure static HTML

CDN

Cloudflare Workers

Global edge delivery — sub-100ms TTFB

Core Web Vitals

All green

LCP < 1.2s, CLS 0, FID < 50ms

Build Output

Static HTML

No server — no downtime, no cold starts

Images

57 optimized assets

Aerial drone + professional interior shots

Search Optimization

SEO Implementation

Signal Value Detail
Schema Types Implemented 6 RealEstateListing, LodgingBusiness, RealEstateAgent, VideoObject, FAQPage, LocalBusiness
Target Keywords 16+ Beverly Hills luxury rental, executive rental BH, Beverly Hills furnished rental…
FAQ Schema Questions 10+ Structured for Google AI Overviews extraction
Meta Coverage 100% Title, description, OG, Twitter Card, canonical on all pages
Sitemap Auto-generated @astrojs/sitemap — submitted to Google Search Console
robots.txt AI bots allowed GPTBot, ClaudeBot, PerplexityBot, Google-Extended explicitly permitted
llms.txt Present Machine-readable property + pricing context for AI agents
Geo Metadata Beverly Hills, CA geo.region, geo.placename, geo.position all set

Site Architecture

Pages & SEO Purpose

/ Homepage Main conversion page — hero, DNA, gallery, CTA /property Property Specs Full amenity detail — answers "what does the property include?" /gallery Photo Gallery 57 photos in 13 sections — image SEO + session depth /beverly-hills-luxury-rentals Beverly Hills Landing Head keyword page — FAQPage schema, market definition block /services Agency Services Portfolio + SEO/web/AI offer for real estate agents /results Results Transparent metrics — social proof for prospective clients /faq FAQ Common tenant questions — long-tail keyword coverage /contact Contact Lead capture — form + phone + WhatsApp /about About Agent trust signals — DRE, brokerage, credentials
